expectedIssues: The word Jackpots is misspelled Jacpots
reportedIssues: Multiple horizontal sections overflow the viewport. The top category tab row cuts off the 'Hot Games' tab, and the game cards on the right side are partially clipped.
The game grid/card layout appears too wide for the mobile viewport, showing partial third-column cards instead of a clean responsive layout.
The bottom navigation bar overlays the lower game content, making the bottom row look partially hidden behind the fixed nav.
The hero carousel arrows are partially clipped at the page edges and overlap the banner artwork, which looks visually rough.
The top header branding area looks crowded, with multiple logos and the state label compressed into a small horizontal space.

expected.reasoning: No reported issue mentions any text spelling error or the word 'Jackpots'/'Jacpots'; all reported issues describe layout and styling problems.
